title: S.O.3936(E), dated 20/12/2017-The Powers Conferred by Section 11 of the National Green Tribunal Act, 2010(19 of 2010), the Central Government hereby authorises Mr. Justice Umesh Dattatraya Salvi, Judicial Member, NGT to Act as Chairperson, NGT

[F. No. 17(30)/2017-PL/NGT] ARUN KUMAR MEHTA, Addl.
